features: Panadol Extra Soluble Tablets, for pain relief. Contain paracetamol. Always read the label.
Paracetamol provides pain relief and caffeine amplifies the pain-relieving effect.
Panadol Extra Soluble Tablets can be taken on an empty stomach
Relieves tough pain, including migraines and other pain including back and period pain.
Panadol Extra soluble Tablets paracetamol delivers powerful, effective pain relief.
description: Product Description Contains paracetamol. Always read the label. Panadol Extra Soluble Tablets are formulated to provide effective headache pain relief and help reduce fever. Panadol Extra Soluble Tablets contain two active ingredients. Paracetamol is a pain reliever and caffeine amplifies the pain-relieving effect of paracetamol. When you’ve got a headache, Panadol Extra Soluble Tablets deliver effective relief. Panadol Extra Soluble Tablets relieve different types of pain, including back pain, toothache, period pain, Migraine pain and joint pain. How to Use Panadol Extra Soluble Tablets: When experiencing pain, adults and children aged 16 years and over should take 2 tablets dissolved in water up to 4 times daily. Do not take more frequently than every 4 hours and no more than 8 tablets in 24 hours. Children aged 12-15 years: Give 1 tablet dissolved in water up to 4 times daily. Do not give more than 4 tablets in 24 hours. Do not take more frequently than every 4 hours. Do not give to children under 12 years of age. Ingredients Each effervescent tablet contains the active ingredients Paracetamol 500 mg and Caffeine 65 mg. Sodium content 427 mg per tablet. Also indudes sorbitol (E 420). Safety Warning WARNINGS Do not take more than the label tells you to. If you do not get better talk to your doctor. Talk to a doctor at once if you take too much of this medicine, even if you feel well. Contains paracetamol. Do not take anything else containing paracetamol while taking this medicine. Avoid too much caffeine in drinks like coffee and tea when taking these tablets. CONSULT YOUR DOCTOR Before taking this medicine if you have liver or kidney disease, including alcoholic liver disease, if you have a severe infection (see section 2 inside for more information). If your headaches become persistent, see your doctor. Keep out of the sight and reach of children. Manufacturer Contact Information Haleon, Building 5, First Floor the Heights Weybridge Surrey KT13 0NY See more
